channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried’s parents appealing to Trump to pardon their beloved son: report
item.description: The mother of Sam Bankman-Fried has apparently had a major change of heart about Trump after once leading a top Silicon Valley fundraising network for anti-Trump Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: World's first AI-designed, 3D-printed shoe wants to be the next Crocs
item.description: A startup claims to have developed the world's first entirely artificial intelligence-designed and 3D-printed shoe, the brainchild of a 25-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tesla promises more affordable EVs and could start its Robotaxi service in June – but I've heard this all before
item.description: Elon Musk makes more big Tesla promises during a quarterly earnings call, but I'd like to see it go back to doing what it does best.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: VMware offers fixes to severe vulnerabilities in VMware Aria
item.description: VMware has fixed multiple high-severity vulnerabilities affecting its cloud management platform (CMP), VMware Aria, which could allow attackers to steal sensitive credentials from the virtualization giant’s IT management and logging solutions.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: La seguridad cuántica acerca a IBM y Telefónica Tech con un nuevo acuerdo de colaboración
item.description: La computación cuántica es una disciplina por la que muchas organizaciones están apostando firmemente, especialmente en el desarrollo y las garantías de una tecnología criptográficamente segura, dados los desafíos futuros a los que podrían enfrentarse.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TypeScript 5.8 arrives in beta
item.description: Microsoft has moved TypeScript 5.8 into the beta stage. The new release of the company’s typed superset of JavaScript introduces a limited form of type checking against conditional types in return statements. The TypeScript 5.8 beta was introduced January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft posts 10% growth for Q4 as it plans to spend $80 billion on AI
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Italy blocks access to the Chinese AI application DeepSeek to protect users' data
item.description: Italy’s data protection authority has blocked use of Chinese tech startup DeepSeek’s AI application to protect Italians’ data and announced an investigation into the companies behind the chatbot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Timeline of HPE’s $14 billion bid for Juniper
item.description: AI is a key factor in one of the tech industry’s most significant M&A developments: HPE’s proposed acquisition of Juniper Networks. The $14 billion deal would shake up the industry, and regulatory watchdogs in the U.S. and worldwide have raised antitrust concerns.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How federal land could generate lots of electricity
item.description: "We estimate 10 to 20 million homes could be served from the electricity that are produced from that renewable energy," said Trieu Mai. The post How federal land could generate lots of electricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Larry Magid: Testing DeepSeek, the Chinese generative AI app
item.description: Based on my tests and published reports, DeepSeek not yet as advanced as its American counterparts, but it’s quite good
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: How to organize, protect and streamline your inbox with an email alias
item.description: Creating an email alias can help clean up your inbox by organizing emails based on purpose, like creating different aliases for shopping, newsletters and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump World learns how to deal with Musk
item.description: President Trump’s allies and aides are learning to deal with Tesla CEO Elon Musk, who has had a consistent presence in the early days of the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The crisis of AI’s hidden costs
item.description: The AI gold rush is creating an unexpected problem: massive waste in resource provisioning. Cloud cost overruns inevitably lead to a lack of true ROI for these systems. Many enterprises spend $2 to get $1 of benefits. That dog won’t hunt.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices
item.description: In the wake of the Salt Typhoon hack, agencies are looking to secure their mobile data using encryption and other techniques. The post Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Prompt Security adds code sanitization, data leak prevention for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Prompt Security has announced an upgrade to its security and governance platform for GitHub Copilot and other AI coding assistants.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 11 cutting-edge programming languages to learn now
item.description: A clean slate. A fresh start. The new broom sweeps clean. The folk sayings are in agreement. Sure, your favorite old programming language is comfortable and easy to use. You know the APIs and libraries backward and forward. But you also know all the glitches, bugs, and failure modes that go with it.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biggest Wi-Fi mistakes you can make on a plane
item.description: It's hard to imagine life without in-flight Wi-Fi these days – but sky-high web surfing comes with its own set of privacy concerns. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
